title: Karbid und Sauerampfer
writer: Frank Beyer, Christel Gräf, Hans Oliva
actors: Erwin Geschonneck, Marita Böhme, Manja Behrens
plot: After the second World War, Dresden has a lot of reconstructing to do. To get the cigarette factory he once worked for running again, Kalle has to travel to Wittenberg - the only place where carbide can be found. Once there, Kalle...
